LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S RE-NOTICE OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. RESPONDENT REQUESTED THE MATTER BE CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21 AS THE PETITIONER IS UNABLE TO ATTEND ON OCTOBER 9. THE COURT GRANTED THE REQUEST AND THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21, 2008 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE MAHONEY. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

(SECOND) RE NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT,AFL- CIO-NEA/CTA HEARING SET FOR JUL-30-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO AMEND FOR FAILURE TO DESCRIBE THE CIRCUMSTANCES RELATED TO EACH CLAIMANT THAT DEMONSTRATES THAT HIS OR HER CLAIM IS SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION AND THAT THE PRELIMINARY STEPS SET FORTH IN THE GRIEVANCE PROCEDURE, SECTION 19, HAVE BEEN MET. GRAPHIC ARTS INT'L UNION V. OAKLAND NAT. ENGRAVING CO. (1986) 185 CAL APP 3D 775, 780-783. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

RE-NOTICE OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT,AFL- CIO-NEA/CTA HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S RE-NOTICE OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Leon Guerrero of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4285) for respondent and opposing party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S RE-NOTICE OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/HEK/PB) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Re-Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Continued To Oct-21-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S RE-NOTICE OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Appearances:
Michael Leon Guerrero of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4285) for respondent

No other appearances on this matter. Respondent requested the matter be continued to October 21 as the petitioner is unable to attend on October 9. The Court granted the request and the matter is continued to October 21, 2008 to be heard by Judge Mahoney. (302/PHA/PB) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600

Ntc Of Hearing On First Amended Peittion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is continued to September 18, 2008 per re-notice of motion. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

(Second) Re Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT/CFT, AFL'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Appearances:
Michael Guerrero of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4285) for respondent and opposing party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied without prejudice to amend for failure to describe the circumstances related to each claimant that demonstrates that his or her claim is subject to arbitration and that the preliminary steps set forth in the grievance procedure, section 19, have been met. Graphic Arts Int'l Union v. Oakland Nat. Engraving Co. (1986) 185 Cal App 3d 775, 780-783. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Re-Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
